NAME: 45 and Up Study
NOTE: Large-scale survey cohort linked to Medicare/hospital data; genetics via consented substudies and linkages.
DESCRIPTION: Australian population cohort of adults ≥45 with long-term linkage to health administrative data; supports large observational and genetic studies including GWAS when genotype data are available to approved projects.
MANUAL_CITATION: 45 and Up Study Collaborators. (2008). Cohort profile: the 45 and up study. International Journal of Epidemiology, 37(5), 941-947.
